description: Apply a unified diff patch to the workspace.
name: apply_patch

description: Run a structured read-only git operation.
name: git

description: List entries in a repo-relative directory.
name: list_dir

description: Search local layered memory records by query, kind, and tag.
name: memory_search

description: Read text content from a repo-relative file. Use tail_lines for questions about the final line, last sentence, or end of a file.
name: read_file

description: Inspect repo-relative file or directory metadata such as size, mtime, line count, and binary status without reading full content.
name: stat
